description: Execute V0.8 Readme Workflow Enrichment: Fully detail all 17 built-in workflows (with their triggers/scenarios) and provide a comprehensive guide on custom workflow authoring for team collaboration. Ensure parity across both English and Chinese versions.
scope: 1. Update README.md and README_zh-CN.md. 2. Inject a full table/list of the 17 built-in workflows and their exact triggers. 3. Add a deep-dive section on Custom Workflow Authoring for collaborative scenarios. 4. Ensure complete bilingual parity.
out_of_scope: Strictly NO modifications to src/mcp-server/, bin/, or active workflow/dispatch.json state semantics outside of this patch progression. NO implementation of runtime execution code. This is a documentation/presentation enhancement only.
stop_conditions: Attempting to modify source code in src/ or bin/.
